children.heading: State assessments
children.label: b State assessments
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out the activities described in part B, $378,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.

children.heading: Education of migratory children
children.label: c Education of migratory children
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out the activities described in part C, $374,751,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.

children.heading: Prevention and intervention programs for children and youth who are neglected, delinquent, or at-risk
children.label: d Prevention and intervention programs for children and youth who are neglected, delinquent, or at-risk
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out the activities described in part D, $47,614,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.

children.heading: Federal activities
children.label: e Federal activities
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out evaluation activities related to subchapter I under , there are authorized to be appropriated $710,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.section 7981 of this title

children.heading: Sense of Congress regarding adjustments to authorizations of appropriations provided in this chapter for future budget agreements
children.label: f Sense of Congress regarding adjustments to authorizations of appropriations provided in this chapter for future budget agreements
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that if legislation is enacted that revises the limits on discretionary spending established under , the levels of appropriations authorized throughout this chapter should be adjusted in a manner that is consistent with the adjustments in nonsecurity category funding provided for under the revised limits on discretionary spending.section 901(c) of title 2
